summary: Iteration 63 - User-Reported Fixes Testing Complete. All 4 user-reported issues verified fixed: 1) Decision Engine APIs working with dummy data (13/13 tests passed), 2) 'Overview' renamed to 'Retirement Tracker' in Personal Mode navigation, 3) SharePortfolio has Buy/Sell buttons with trade modal for partial amounts, 4) AI Copilot renders with Layout wrapper (not opening in new window). Portfolio Aggregator loads with fallback data.

issues: Disclaimer modal appears on every page load - consider adding 'Don't show again' option or session-based dismissal

critical_code_review_comments: All 4 user-reported issues have been fixed and verified
Decision Engine APIs (health-score-v2, recommendations-v2, net-worth-projection, monte-carlo-advanced, wealth-brief, quick-analysis, scenario) all working correctly
SharePortfolio Buy/Sell buttons visible on all 7 holdings with trade modal for partial buy/sell
AI Copilot page renders with Layout wrapper - left navigation visible, not opening in new window
Portfolio Aggregator loads with fallback data (7 accounts, $3M+ net worth)
'Retirement Tracker' correctly replaces 'Overview' in Personal Mode navigation
seed_data_creation: Used existing demo/fallback data. Decision Engine uses calculated dummy data based on input parameters.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 63 verified all 4 user-reported fixes: 1) Decision Engine backend with dummy data for analysis features, 2) 'Overview' renamed to 'Retirement Tracker' in personal nav, 3) Buy/Sell buttons with trade modal in SharePortfolio, 4) AI Copilot wrapped with Layout component. All components have fallback data when APIs fail.

mocked_apis.Decision_Engine: MOCKED - All endpoints return calculated dummy data based on input parameters
mocked_apis.Portfolio_Aggregator: MOCKED - Fallback accounts (bank, super, brokerage) when API fails

features_verified.decision_engine_health_score_v2: WORKING - Returns overall score, grade, component scores, metrics
features_verified.decision_engine_recommendations_v2: WORKING - Returns personalized recommendations with priority
features_verified.decision_engine_monte_carlo_advanced: WORKING - Returns success probability, percentiles, statistics
features_verified.share_portfolio_buy_button: WORKING - Buy button visible on all holdings
features_verified.share_portfolio_sell_button: WORKING - Sell button visible on all holdings
features_verified.share_portfolio_trade_modal: WORKING - Trade modal opens for buy/sell with quantity input
features_verified.ai_copilot_layout_wrapper: WORKING - Renders with Layout, left navigation visible
features_verified.ai_copilot_not_new_window: WORKING - Does not open in new window
features_verified.navigation_retirement_tracker: WORKING - 'Retirement Tracker' in Personal Mode nav (renamed from Overview)
